parameters.jsCode:
// Merge job data from either branch
return { json: $json };

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "job_number": {{ JSON.stringify($json.jobNumber) }},
  "job_id": {{ JSON.stringify($json.jobId) }},
  "job_name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.jobName) }},
  "customer_name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.customerName) }},
  "customer_id": {{ JSON.stringify($json.customerId) }},
  "project_type": {{ JSON.stringify($json.projectType) }},
  "total_cost": {{ $json.totals.cost || 0 }},
  "total_price": {{ $json.totals.price || 0 }},
  "margin_percent": {{ $json.totals.margin || 0 }},
  "labor_hours": {{ $json.totals.laborHrs || 0 }},
  "item_count": {{ $json.totals.items || 0 }},
  "project_state": {{ JSON.stringify($json.projectState) }},
  "jt_payload": {{ JSON.stringify($json.jtPayload) }},
  "pushed_to_jt": {{ $json.jtPushSuccess }},
  "jt_push_error": {{ JSON.stringify($json.jtPushError) }},
  "jt_push_result": {{ JSON.stringify($json.jtPushResult) }}
}

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "jtPushSuccess": {{ $json.jtPushSuccess }},
  "jtPushError": {{ JSON.stringify($json.jtPushError) }},
  "jobId": {{ JSON.stringify($json.jobId) }},
  "jobNumber": {{ JSON.stringify($json.jobNumber) }},
  "jobCreated": {{ $json.jobCreated || false }},
  "itemsPushed": {{ $json.itemsPushed || 0 }},
  "archived": true,
  "requestId": {{ JSON.stringify($json.requestId) }}
}
